TestCase z9Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n <= 0
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code: reverse entire array
    int left = 0;
    int right = follow_case.n - 1;
    while (left < right) {
        int temp = follow_case.a[left];
        follow_case.a[left] = follow_case.a[right];
        follow_case.a[right] = temp;
        left++;
        right--;
    }

    return follow_case;
}
